title: Device Home Screen - Connecting Headset when device list is empty
scenario: Empty device list on home screen does not update with newly connected headset after Bluetooth pairing and returning to the app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure the Home screen shows an empty device list (no previously paired headsets).
3. Open the Android Bluetooth settings menu (Settings → Bluetooth).
4. Pair and connect a Poly Bluetooth headset (e.g., Poly Voyager 5200) via the Bluetooth menu.
5. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app (navigate back to the Home screen).
6. Observe the device list on the Home screen.
expected: The newly connected Poly headset should appear in the app's device list on the Home screen.
